[[File:Heavy ballista (Last Man Standing) detail.png|left|200px]]
The '''heavy ballista''' from [[Last Man Standing]] is a minigame-exclusive variant of the normal [[heavy ballista]]. It can be obtained (along with 5,000 [[Dragon javelin (Last Man Standing)|dragon javelins]]) from opening the [[Chest (Last Man Standing)|chests]] with a [[bloody key]] or [[bloodier key]], or looting the [[Crate (Last Man Standing)|crates]] that spawn at random locations on the map. It is dropped on death to whoever killed you.

==Special attack==
[[File:Concentrated Shot (heavy ballista).gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the heavy ballista's special attack, ''Concentrated Shot''.]]
The heavy ballista has a [[special attack]], ''Concentrated Shot'', which it shares with the [[light ballista]]. It performs an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage.

The special attack consumes 65% of the player's special attack energy.
